arts.ttl: Aston Villa ‘about to accept’ €70m+ offer for Jhon Duran from Al-Nassr
arts.sum: Jhon Duran has been linked with multiple clubs during the January transfer window, with it seeming clear someone around the footballer has been looking to build a big money deal. There’s been links with other Premier League clubs and there was even an ambitious claim over the past week which stated Real Madrid are keen The post Aston Villa ‘about to accept’ €70m+ offer for Jhon Duran from Al-Nassr appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers CONFIRMS Arsenal star Kieran Tierney will join Celtic this summer - but still hopes to bring him back to the Scottish giants this month
arts.sum: With loanee Alex Valle back at parent club Barcelona , Rodgers would like the left back to return north of the border before next week's transfer deadline to bolster his defence.

arts.ttl: Team News: Aston Villa vs. Celtic injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Wednesday's Champions League clash between Aston Villa and Celtic.

arts.ttl: He almost signed for Celtic in 2018, now he's one of Aston Villa's star players
arts.sum: There is, of course, an argument to be made that in the time that Brendan Rodgers wanted to bring the Aston Villa star to Paradise, he could have struggled to get into the starting lineup. Whilst there was no doubting his talent, McGinn would have been an excellent signing for Celtic but ended up choosing to make the move to Villa after a last-minute phone call from the then manager, Steve Bruce.

arts.ttl: Unai Emery insists Tyrone Mings knee injury is ‘not big’ before Celtic meeting
arts.sum: Villans host Bhoys in Champions League on Wednesday Defender Mings was in tears after injury at West Ham Unai Emery has allayed fears over another lengthy absence for Tyrone Mings after the Aston Villa defender’s distraught reaction to his latest knee injury against West Ham on Sunday. Emery even floated the idea of Mings facing Celtic in the Champions League on Wednesday, only to be contradicted by the Villa midfielder Jacob Ramsey. Mings was in tears as he exited early in the 1-1 draw with West Ham. The 31-year-old has been troubled by persistent knee problems, including two anterior cruciate ligament injuries. Understandably, onlookers – and the England international himself – feared the worst on Sunday. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers hoping Arsenal’s Kieran Tierney will rejoin Celtic in days
arts.sum: Deal done for left-back to go back to Scotland in summer But Rodgers keen for move to be in this transfer window Brendan Rodgers has confirmed for the first time that Celtic have agreed a deal to re-sign Kieran Tierney from Arsenal. With a free transfer in place for the summer, Celtic hope to be able to bring Tierney back to Glasgow before this transfer window closes. Celtic sold Tierney to Arsenal in 2019 for £25m, the left-back having come through the youth ranks at the Scottish champions. Speculation never really disappeared that Tierney would return to Celtic; those stories intensified after it became clear Arsenal would not take up the option to extend Tierney’s contract at the end of this campaign. Continue reading...
